architectureNotes: Correction (widget name 'Correction', dataType 'correction') IS an assessment widget — 'correction' is present in support/module-setup.ts ASSESSMENT_DATA_TYPES, so resolveDropTarget routes it to a Generic Step column. It drops via cy.dropComponentForModule('Correction', { dataType: 'correction' }), mirroring the Extended Response sibling.

Canvas wrapper is .canvas-wrap.correction[correction-template] (.component-holder). Header Text (.sc-intro, ng-model fieldData.introduction) and Instruction Text (.sc-instr, ng-model fieldData.instruction) are contenteditable — set via cy.setContentEditableOn, never cy.type().

Header & Instruction visibility default true (correction.json isHeaderVisible/isInstructionVisible) and are toggled by #header-visibility / #instr-visibility checkboxes; the canvas blocks switch displayBlock/displayNone via ng-class.
Settings panel class is .correction-settings-panel with title 'Correction' and icon .icon-Correction.

'Add Sentence' (span[data-ng-click=addSentenceClick]) pushes a Text Description into fieldData.settings.correctionInfo. correction.js enforces max_question=10 and min_question=1. Row delete (.row-delete) is .disabled when correctionInfo.length===1.

SOURCE AMBIGUITY: correction.html toggles a 'btn-disabled' CSS class on the Add Sentence label at correctionInfo.length>=6 (using a fieldData.TemplateData.correctionInfo path), but the active addSentenceClick handler still pushes rows up to max_question=10 (using fieldData.settings.correctionInfo). TC_18 asserts the script-enforced cap (<=10), which is the effective behaviour.

Outline radios value 'outline' (No Outline) / 'outlineBg' (Outline) bound to currSettings.outline (default 'outline'). Action Assets colour via .colorPickerButton + .colorPickerInputBox bound to currSettings.Appearance (default '#7eb1eb').
'Allow activity restart' (#add-activity-restart) and 'Add Show Me' (#add-show-me) render only when !currSettings.isGroupActivity — flag-gated, not asserted.
Tags use <tag-manager> inside .tagsContainer, rendered only when currSettings.showText (default true); spec degrades gracefully if absent.

Strikethrough + correct-answer markers (.correction-Popup / .correction-Popup1 with .correction-Strik + .popup-Delete) are present in the canvas DOM but are activated by word selection at runtime; the student find-and-fix outcome (red line + correct answer) is verified in Preview/Reader — DEFERRED.

Copy / Delete component controls come from the shared add-common-hover chrome rather than Correction markup; the spec uses best-effort selectors and logs+returns gracefully when the hover toolbar is not mounted in the headless DOM.

Preview/Reader find-and-fix, submit-validation, responsiveness, accessibility/screen-reader, network disconnect, copy success pop-up + lifecycle, and persistence-after-reload require flows outside the authoring DOM — DEFERRED.
NOT YET LIVE-VERIFIED: selectors are derived from source templates; they have not been executed against a running authoring instance (AUTHORING_LAUNCH_URL was not available).
